_comment: FTSE 250 index level at most recent London close. The FTSE 250 is a cleaner read on the domestic UK economy than the FTSE 100 (which is dominated by global commodity and pharma names). LSEG does not expose a free index-level JSON feed; the number is transcribed from the published closing price each week. The adapter's freshness guard rejects fixtures older than 14 days so a missed refresh surfaces in the ingest audit. TODO(source): an authorised LSEG index-licence vendor would let us drop this fixture and fetch the close directly.

ftse_250.source: London Stock Exchange FTSE 250 closing level, 17 April 2026

release_schedule: Every London trading day at ~16:30; editorial fixture refreshed weekly.
